notes: Primary venue record including workflow stage, health state, and current_signals.
Saved AI/manual intake payloads plus report and constraint output when present.
Mutable task graph, review state, comments, assignments, due dates, and deliverables.
Timeline notes, updates, and escalation-like activity.
Thread index and per-thread message history.
Activation/deactivation log written when assessments replace current_signals.
Static workspace actor catalog used for assignments and audit metadata.
System-wide event trail for plan generation, progress, chat, and review actions.
Brand records referenced by project create/update flows.
Passphrase hash, Anthropic key, and runtime knobs are persisted outside app data.
